programme.title: Wondrous & Wild
programme.desc: A glimpse at the marvelous life on Earth, from births to deaths, joy to danger, day to night.

programme.title: The Lions Rule - Part 1
programme.desc: In summer, the Glade is a paradise in Ruaha's dry plains, always providing water and sparking relationships.

programme.title: The Lions Rule - Part 2
programme.desc: As the dry continues in Ruaha, herds of elephants arrive in the Glade.

programme.title: The Lions Rule - Part 3
programme.desc: Cubs grow quickly, learning to hunt, until one young lion begins to change, disrupting life in the Glade.

programme.title: Wonders Of Africa: What A Difference A Day Makes
programme.desc: In Africa, where giants roam and predators hunt, every day brings wonders, life, and death.

programme.title: Wild Ways of the Coast
programme.desc: Many dream of sandy beaches, palm-lined inlets, and marine life thriving across coasts and mangroves.

programme.title: Air
programme.desc: At first sight, our atmosphere seems empty. But this mantle of air is a habitat for life in its own right.

programme.title: Land
programme.desc: Viewed from space, our blue planet seems so familiar that we forget how extraordinary it is.

programme.title: Water
programme.desc: The oceans act as a driving force for local weather phenomena and global climate change.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Apes, Dogs
programme.desc: Four small leopards are born, while the wild dog pack has managed to dig their way to the monkeys.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Leopard, Wild Dog
programme.desc: Schalk brings a litter of wild dogs to Harnas, and for caracal Tammy a new chapter is about to start.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Lizard, Leopard
programme.desc: A monitor lizard has made himself comfortable between 19 wild cheetahs.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Leopard
programme.desc: One of seven cheetahs living in the enclosure near the built-up area of the farm is about to be released.

programme.title: Practice makes perfect
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson moves 27 lions and 14 hyenas, facing challenges with reluctant animals and permits.

programme.title: Precious Cargo
programme.desc: Kevin fights to relocate lions and hyenas, forming a new pride while managing hyena tensions.

programme.title: Leap Of The Lynx
programme.desc: Until five years ago, both populations of Iberian lynx were quickly fading away.

programme.title: King of the Seas - Sea Eagle
programme.desc: Germany’s Sea eagles thrive by stealing food from sea ravens, showcasing their expert poaching skills.

programme.title: King of the Mountains - Golden Eagle
programme.desc: Witness Golden eagles in aerial views, showcasing their majestic flights, and hunting skills.

programme.title: The Art of Seduction
programme.desc: Life is filled with magical moments. Some are extra-special.

programme.title: Masters of Disguise
programme.desc: Size is no obstacle for these wild magicians, from tiny insects to the mega-mammals of the African plains.

programme.title: Smart and Smarter
programme.desc: Navigation without a map? No problem. Building a fortress out of living bodies? Check.

programme.title: The Far East
programme.desc: The Amur's coastal delta is one of the richest ecosystems on earth.

programme.title: The Black Dragon
programme.desc: The Amur, or Heilong-jian, winds through Manchuria, forming a natural border between China and Russia.

programme.title: The Secret Springs
programme.desc: Follow Mongolian gazelles, nomads, and wildlife: eagles, wolves, marmots, and more in vast wilderness.

programme.title: The Loco-motion Picture
programme.desc: Watch how animals move differently, exploring nature's ways to keep creatures alive and in motion.

programme.title: The Witness is a Whale
programme.desc: The whales are the witnesses to a past of giants and also to an untold history: the clues are everywhere.

programme.title: Under Cover - Every Body Needs a Coat
programme.desc: From fur to feathers, from scales to shells – every creature has some form of characteristic outer layer.

programme.title: Carnivorous Plants
programme.desc: Scientists have recently shown that many more plants than we had ever thought are carnivorous.

programme.title: Orchids
programme.desc: Orchids produce thousands of seeds, which are so small that they contain no food reserves.

programme.title: Unnatural Selection
programme.desc: What has happened to evolution? The answer is very simple: us.

programme.title: Tall & Tiny - Nature's Extremes
programme.desc: Tremendously tall – or ridiculously small: nature never ceases to surprise.

programme.title: Wildlife in the Cantabrian Mountains - Part 1
programme.desc: The Cantabrian Mountains reveal wildlife like bears and wolves, showcasing survival in harsh climates.

programme.title: Wildlife in the Cantabrian Mountains - Part 2
programme.desc: Discover the hidden Cantabrian Mountains, home to bears, wolves, and capercaillies, thriving in nature.

programme.title: Wales - Spirit of the Dragon
programme.desc: Wales, with its peaks, forests, and shores, may be small but rivals the wild wealth of any land.

programme.title: Wild Cornwall: Out On The Edge
programme.desc: Cornwall, once a haven for smugglers and pirates, has never truly been uninhabited.

programme.title: Baboon, Cheetah, Bush Baby
programme.desc: How will an orphaned baby baboon respond when meeting a fellow baboon at an emergency wildlife center?

programme.title: Rhino, Hyrax, Porcupine
programme.desc: Every day a monitoring team at Somkhanda Game Reserve keeps track of a rhino and her calf.

programme.title: Elephant, Chimpanzee, Wildebeest
programme.desc: We visit the animal carers of Lilayi Elephant Nursery in Zambia and the Mefou Primate Park in Cameroon.

programme.title: Wild Dog, Baboon, Antelope
programme.desc: Rehabilitating and teaching young wild dog packs to hunt is a goal of Erindi Private Game Reserve in Namibia.

programme.title: White Beauty - A Stallion's Life
programme.desc: The Lipizzaner are famous around the world. A documentary about the history of the oldest horse breed.

programme.title: Wet & Dry
programme.desc: Discover the fascinating solutions that animals have developed to thrive in extreme habitats around the world.

programme.title: Hot & Cold
programme.desc: From the poles to the tropics, from desert to swamp, from mountain peaks to ocean depths.

programme.title: High & Low
programme.desc: The highest and the lowest places of our planet also offer niches where life thrives.

programme.title: What a Colourful World
programme.desc: A global journey to discover the colourful creatures that make our world wonderfully diverse.

programme.title: Strandwolf
programme.desc: This is the story of Tosca, a long-haired, primeval-looking brown hyena.

programme.title: Planet Parrot
programme.desc: Alien invaders, like colourful parrots, thrive in cities, outsmarting species and making urban life their own.

programme.title: Ostrich: A Life On The Run
programme.desc: This bird is something special: it can neither sing nor fly – but it is able to run at a speed of 70 km/h.

programme.title: Snowy Owl: Queen Of The North
programme.desc: The snowy owl glares across the tundra with all-knowing eyes – these owls seem to capture our imagination

programme.title: Bird Brain
programme.desc: It’s used as an insult – ‘bird brain’ – not bright. But new research suggests that this may no longer apply.

programme.title: Between Worlds - Part 2
programme.desc: Tarahumara and Woodabe: isolated lives, autonomous families, and nomadic traditions endure unchanged.

programme.title: Between Worlds - Part 1
programme.desc: Ancient customs fade: Yanomami traditions face threats, and Greenland's seal hunts yield to modernity.

programme.title: Big Bugs
programme.desc: The world of bugs – insects and arachnids – can be as spectacular as that of the big mammal predators.

programme.title: Mountains of the Moon
programme.desc: The Nile's source in the Great East African Rift Valley, shaped by tectonic forces, forms towering mountains.

programme.title: Dropped - S06:E03 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The Keefer Brothers make an important decision that vastly impacts their expedition. In a desperate search of necessary food, they attempt to hunt big game for the first time in New Zealand, and encounter a new set of challenges.

programme.title: Dropped - S06:E04 - Driving the Bus
programme.desc: Chris and Casey are introduced to the tastes of the New Zealand wild, and get a rude awakening. Mother Nature's mind games start to mess with the brothers' mental strength, while their inflatable raft continues to be a serious problem.

programme.title: Wardens - S04:E13 - 700 Yards
programme.desc: Joe Kambic patrols Deer Lodge, Montana and Kqyn Kuka attempts to rescue a sick buck from the ice.

programme.title: Wardens - S04:E14 - Sullivan Hill
programme.desc: It's elk hunting season in Montana, and Bryan Golie is keeping an eye out for any hunters acting suspiciously. Meanwhile, Paul Luepke is dealing with two hunters who shot mule deer does without having the right permits.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E05 - Delta Prison Rescue Operation
programme.desc: In 1989, CIA operative Kurt Muse was imprisoned at the notorious Carcel Modelo in Panama for his role in organizing radio transmissions against dictator Manuel Noriega. That December, an elite group of the US Delta Force breached the roof of the prison, and one of the most daring close quarter battle operations in history began. From the dramatic helicopter crash and wounding of several Delta operators to the extraction of the entire team by the 5th Infantry Division, this is prime material for CQB analysis. In this episode, CQB recreates the raid, focusing on the “sub-second” reflexes of the Delta Force team from the moment they entered the prison to their extraction from the roof of the...

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E06 - Snipers and Scout
programme.desc: Joint Task Force Two (JTF 2) is the elite Canadian Forces Special Operations unit responsible for a broad range of missions, including counter-terrorism and armed assistance to other government departments. Highly secretive, JTF 2 and its predecessor, the Canadian Airborne Regiment, have been deployed in hotspots around the world from Haiti to Bosnia. This episode focuses on the legendary JTF sniper teams and their use in Afghanistan alongside the British SAS and the US Delta Force at “the sharp end of the spear.” A book written by an ex-JTF member explains how, in 2006, both the Pentagon and the British Foreign Office noted the instrumental role that JTF 2 played in the rescue of the...

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E01 - American Icons
programme.desc: American buffalo are being caught and researched with the assistance of American motocross champ Ryan Villopoto.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E02 - Big Move
programme.desc: Ivan is off to Zimbabwe to team up with conservationists focusing on capturing and relocating 100 elephants.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E26 - Prince William A Royal Portrait
programme.desc: Explore the exciting and intriguing life of the future king, Prince William, in this engaging documentary.

programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E26 - Prince William A Royal Portrait
programme.desc: Explore the exciting and intriguing life of the future king, Prince William, in this engaging documentary.

programme.title: Dropped - S06:E03 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The Keefer Brothers make an important decision that vastly impacts their expedition. In a desperate search of necessary food, they attempt to hunt big game for the first time in New Zealand, and encounter a new set of challenges.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S01:E01 - Rhino Wars
programme.desc: Carter's W.A.R. (Wild Animal Response) is the untold story of one man's quest to save his homeland, the world's most wild and dangerous continent on earth, Africa. From heavily armed poachers butchering elephants for their tusks to the slaughter of rhinos for their horns, Africa's most precious resource is in peril. Can one man expose the truth and make a difference? Watch as wildlife detective and professional hunter, Ivan Carter, takes you inside the real Africa to the front lines of the wars being waged on its wildlife. In this episode Ivan Carter exposes the secret war in Africa. A war of greed that's putting the rhino in danger.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E09 - Disguised
programme.desc: Now you see me… now you don’t. A look at the masters of disguise. From hidden lizards and invisible spiders to camouflaged cats and shimmering squids.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E10 - Micro Predators
programme.desc: They may be small but don’t be fooled - micro predators can be deadly. From the impressive serial killer Portia spider to the hundreds of species of ants and the archerfish with its precision firing of water droplets to secure its prey Wild Ones peers through the microscope to uncover their true lethality.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E11 - Most Poisonous_
programme.desc: You wouldn’t want to be bitten by any of these but which one has the deadliest poison? The venom from the most poisonous snake on the planet? A rare poisonous lizard? Or is it the blue ringed octopus?

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E12 - Migration
programme.desc: Animals, big and not so big, traverse hundreds of miles – some in search of food, others to find ideal breeding grounds. From Zebras crossing the savannahs of Africa to the huge journeys undertaken by turtles to find the perfect beach to lay their eggs – the annual and often dangerous journeys are simply mind boggling.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E27 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 1
programme.desc: As royal wives, both Diana and Fergie experienced a life filled with loneliness and sadness, despite their high hopes of bringing change to the House of Windsor. What was supposed to be their 'fairy-tale' lives ended up being far from that reality.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E28 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 2
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, and Sarah, Duchess of York both married into the Queen's family, leaving in the midst of scandals, though their exits were quite different. Sadly, Diana passed away, while Sarah survived to start anew. Over time, their struggles can be better understood, and this documentary explores those challenges...

programme.title: Dropped - S06:E05 - Round Two
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Chris and Casey disagree on what their next course of action should be. Without clear cache directions, the brothers are left with a hard choice. Should they stay, or should they go?

programme.title: Dropped - S06:E06 - Peaks and Valleys
programme.desc: Chris and Casey hike the mountainside, but the steep slopes and shifting shale make the trek anything but easy. The brothers face energy depletion and exhaustion, and they feel the pressure to find new food sources soon, or go hungry.

programme.title: Wardens - S04:E15 - Log Jam
programme.desc: Dangerous log jams on the Flathead River threaten unprepared boaters and tubers.

programme.title: Wardens - S04:E16 - Casting Doubt
programme.desc: A slew of un-licensed anglers catch the attention of Game Wardens.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E07 - S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: In 1968, a new form of military policing was being developed in a rural area north of Los Angeles. The Los Angeles Police Department sent an observer to this unit, and he, in turn, took this knowledge back to the LAPD. This contributed to the development of the department’s first Special Weapons and Tactics (S.W.A.T.) team. This CQB episode takes an historical journey to examine how this incident affected and changed police tactics around the world. Using CQB’s trademark “sub-second” analysis, the program also looks at how police S.W.A.T. teams train, plan and equip themselves for the challenges of urban combat. The dramatization of a 1980s S.W.A.T. siege of a gang safe-house demonstrates...

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E08 - Hunting Sarajevo Snipers
programme.desc: The Bosnian War was an extraordinarily complex event, with many layers of military involvement including NATO forces, national militaries, irregular paramilitary forces, mujahedeen revolutionaries, private security companies, and international intelligence personnel. One tactic in particular struck fear into the hearts of the military and civilians alike: the use of snipers positioned in high buildings. This edition of CQB investigates this specific combat technique and how it was countered by opposing forces. Taking viewers inside a “sniper‘s den,” the program explains how this tactic was so successfully used by rebel forces – and how traditional military techniques evolved to combat it.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E03 - Bear In Focus
programme.desc: A group of conservationists are observing a family of black bears in the wooded hills of Oklahoma, and Ivan gets to meet them.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E04 - Aggressive Measures
programme.desc: Ivan goes to Mozambique to join an anti-poaching team that focuses on catching poachers and protecting at-risk animals.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E30 - Prince William And Prince Harry Prisoners Of Celebrity
programme.desc: Two young men who have had to cope with extraordinarily challenging events and circumstances as, together, they have gone on to change the face of the British royal family and carve meaningful roles for themselves in the modern world. Made in 1999 two years after the death of their mother, Princess Diana, this original and touching documentary examines the lives of the royal princes, the legacy of their mother, the responsibilities of being a royal - and what the future holds for them.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2000, l'adolescente Tara Munsey scompare dopo un turno di lavoro in un ristorante della Virginia.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dopo la morte di un universitario, gli investigatori scoprirono il mistero pieno di tradimenti e vendette.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una ragazza viene trovata morta nel suo appartamento. Con poche prove sulla scena, il caso rimane irrisolto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35 anni, venne condannata per l'omicidio di David Nixon nell'aprile 2002 dopo che aveva pianificato di porre fine alla loro relazione.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1991, Dorothy Donovan fu assassinata nella sua casa a Dover, Delaware e la polizia era scettica quando suo figlio Charles Holden dichiarò che era stata uccisa da un autostoppista a cui lui aveva dato un passaggio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un dottorando dell'Università Statale del Michigan scomparve e venne creduto morto. Con l'aiuto di un professore di scienze geologiche, la polizia sperava di trovare del "marcio" sul suo assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un chirurgo viene colpito a morte e il sospettato principale viene visto al ristorante al momento del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2005, David Castor subì una morte lenta e straziante nell'arco di giorni. Sua moglie Stacey sosteneva che si trattasse di suicidio, anche se era stato eseguito con l'antigelo.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il rapinatore sparò quando la famiglia di quattro persone entrò in casa, uccidendone due e ferendo gli altri. Aprì alcuni cassetti per far sembrare che si trattasse di una rapina, ma la scena del delitto era stata chiaramente preparata.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il 20 maggio 2001, Carrie Nelson, allora ventenne, è stata picchiata a morte mentre lavorava da sola in un ufficio del parco.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il 12 maggio 1994, Crystal Perry fu brutalmente assassinata nella sua casa a Bridgton, nel Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32 anni, fu dichiarato colpevole di omicidio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quanto può essere sfortunato un uomo? Sua moglie si è tolta la vita e la sua fidanzata del college si uccise allo stesso modo quattordici anni prima. Gli investigatori dovevano stabilire se si trattasse solo di una strana coincidenza o di un delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2001, Ginger Hayes e suo figlio Nicholas furono rapiti durante un furto d'auto e il crimine fu denunciato da un testimone pochi minuti dopo l'accaduto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19enne, fu condannata per aver pugnalato la madre, Barbara Mullenix, il 13 settembre 2006, e poi aver imballato il suo cadavere insanguinato in una scatola di cartone prima di scaricarlo a Newport Bay, sulla costa della California.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando un giovane vigile del fuoco morì per quella che sembrava essere una grave malattia cardiaca non diagnosticata, la sua famiglia e i suoi amici erano devastati ma non avevano prove del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nella notte di Halloween del 2004, Adriane Insogna e Leslie Mazzara furono brutalmente uccise nella loro casa di Napa, in California.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una studentessa universitaria scomparve senza lasciare traccia, i compagni di studi si preoccuparono.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La vittima era un self-made man che non ha mai usato mezzi termini. Forse è stato assassinato da un cliente o da un dipendente insoddisfatto. Forse le foto audaci nella sua cassaforte contenevano l'indizio per risolvere il crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Quando una donna di 79 anni viene trovata uccisa a casa sua, gli investigatori sospettano inizialmente il marito o un vicino violento. I bossoli dei proiettili ritrovati sulla scena e un database high-tech rivelano l'improbabile assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una giovane famiglia viene uccisa, i detective devono decifrare le minacce scritte sulla scena del crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una ragazza viene trovata morta nel suo appartamento. Con poche prove sulla scena, il caso rimane irrisolto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La vittima venne pugnalata più di cento volte, lasciando la sua camera da letto intrisa di sangue. Anche se il suo corpo era posizionato in modo suggestivo, non era stata violentata. È stato un crimine sessuale o è stato un atto di violenza casuale?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35 anni, venne condannata per l'omicidio di David Nixon nell'aprile 2002 dopo che aveva pianificato di porre fine alla loro relazione.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una giovane e attraente parrucchiera fu violentata e uccisa nel suo salone di bellezza. Le prove sul luogo del delitto non corrispondevano a nessuno dei sospettati e, dopo l'indagine iniziale, il caso rimase irrisolto per dieci anni.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La videosorveglianza in un casinò seguì i movimenti di una giovane fino a poco prima della sua scomparsa.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Uno scheletro umano venne scoperto nelle paludi della Carolina del Nord. Quando gli investigatori seppero che era morta da 18 mesi, capirono che sarebbe stato difficile scoprire chi fosse, tanto meno chi l'avesse uccisa.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19enne, fu condannata per aver pugnalato la madre, Barbara Mullenix, il 13 settembre 2006, e poi aver imballato il suo cadavere insanguinato in una scatola di cartone prima di scaricarlo a Newport Bay, sulla costa della California.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: L'assassino probabilmente sperava di coprire le proprie tracce inscenando la scena del crimine. Ma gli investigatori hanno visto il tentativo quasi subito e si sono rivolti alla scienza forense per scoprire cosa è realmente accaduto quella notte.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La donna venne violentata, pugnalata più volte e lasciata morire. Quando qualcuno che coincideva con la descrizione si è praticamente costituito, la polizia era sicura di avere il suo uomo... finché le prove del DNA non hanno dimostrato il contrario.

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie
programme.desc: Dopo essere stati sorpresi a rubare le risposte del test scolastico, i gemelli Zip e Zap sono costretti per punizione a trascorrere l’estate in un rigido istituto dove è vietato ogni tipo di divertimento.

programme.title: Il ragazzo e il grande elefante
programme.desc: Da quando entrambi i genitori sono morti, Phoenix viene affidato alla zia Sarah, che vive in Africa con suo marito Jack. Qui rimane subito affascinato dalla natura selvaggia del continente. Durante un safari incontrerà un grande elefante con cui andrà incontro a emozionanti avventure.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Unitevi a Barbie e alla sua sorellina Chelsea nel meraviglioso viaggio attraverso il magico mondo di Dreamtopia, una nuova e speciale avventura animata!

programme.title: La Mia Prima Barbie: Felice Giorno da Sogno
programme.desc: Canta insieme a Barbie, Barbie, Teresa e Renee in questa avventura musicale mentre pianificano la più grande festa di compleanno a sorpresa di sempre per la sorella di Barbie, Chelsea. "Più grande di UN SEMPLICE compleanno, dobbiamo pianificare un GIORNO DA SOGNO!"

programme.title: Alieni in soffitta
programme.desc: È tempo di vacanze estive per la famiglia Pearson. Cala la notte e improvvisamente quattro oggetti luminosi si dirigono verso il tetto. Un gruppo di alieni è alla conquista della casa.

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe
programme.desc: La vera storia di Robinson Crusoe raccontata dal pappagallo Venerdì che sull'isola è diventato il suo migliore amico.

programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: Nocedicocco: Il piccolo drago
programme.desc: Nocedicocco è un draghetto sputafuoco che non ha ancora imparato a volare e che ha anche qualche problema nello sputare il fuoco. L'unico che ha davvero fiducia in lui è il nonno che lo vede come un se stesso giovane. Gli assegna così un compito di responsabilità...

programme.title: Il viaggio di Norm
programme.desc: Norm, un orso bianco vegano e ballerino con la straordinaria capacità di parlare la lingua umana, deve lasciare il Polo Nord per raggiungere New York e fermare lo spietato costruttore Sig.

programme.title: Il ragazzo e il grande elefante
programme.desc: Da quando entrambi i genitori sono morti, Phoenix viene affidato alla zia Sarah, che vive in Africa con suo marito Jack. Qui rimane subito affascinato dalla natura selvaggia del continente. Durante un safari incontrerà un grande elefante con cui andrà incontro a emozionanti avventure.

programme.title: Alieni in soffitta
programme.desc: È tempo di vacanze estive per la famiglia Pearson. Cala la notte e improvvisamente quattro oggetti luminosi si dirigono verso il tetto. Un gruppo di alieni è alla conquista della casa.

programme.title: Russell Madness - Wrestler a 4 Zampe
programme.desc: Per Russell, un'adorabile terrier, la famiglia significa tutto e farà di tutto per trovarne una – anche salire su un ring e sfidare il campione in carica!

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Il Tenente Pappan assume il comando di un'indagine sui Rider Oscuri, mentre lui e Lilia seguono una pista verso la Valle Omi.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute e Cheval si separano: Lute e Navirou si dirigono verso Borgo Zampa con una piccola deviazione per andare a trovare delle vecchie conoscenze non troppo amichevoli.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Cheval e Cryo vanno nel Deserto Tresed in cerca dei Rider Oscuri e di un po' di pace per Cheval. Ma chi ha ucciso tutti questi mostri?

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Mille e Hyoro vengono richiamati al Villaggio di Hakum per partecipare alla tradizionale Monstie Gara con Nariki. Ma un guastafeste scombina i loro piani.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: I Numeri incontrano Itsy-Bits che li implora di aiutare il Dottor Manelger, ma saranno loro ad aver bisogno del suo aiuto quando apparirà un mostro meccanico.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute incontra Gale per la seconda volta. Il Rider Oscuro vuole ancora la sua Gemma, ma invece di combattere, Lute cerca di farlo ragionare da Rider a Rider.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: I giovani Rider di Hakum irrompono nella Fortezza Oscura per cercare Avinia e le Gemme della Fratellanza rubate. Avinia ricorda il suo passato e Anvis fa una mossa inaspettata.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Avinia è invitata a festeggiare il Capodanno al Villaggio di Hakum. Lì ritrova la sua compagna di viaggio e i suoi ricordi cominciano a riaffiorare.

programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: Alpha & Omega
programme.desc: Due giovani lupi in contrasto l'uno con l'altro si trovano a doversi alleare per far fronte alla situazione sfavorevole nella quale sono finiti

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe
programme.desc: La vera storia di Robinson Crusoe raccontata dal pappagallo Venerdì che sull'isola è diventato il suo migliore amico.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia
programme.desc: La sorella più giovane di Barbie, Chelsea, viene iscritta a una gara di biciclette locale dalla sua amica, ma si sente imbarazzata perché non riesce a pedalare senza le rotelle.

programme.title: Nocedicocco: Il piccolo drago
programme.desc: Nocedicocco è un draghetto sputafuoco che non ha ancora imparato a volare e che ha anche qualche problema nello sputare il fuoco. L'unico che ha davvero fiducia in lui è il nonno che lo vede come un se stesso giovane. Gli assegna così un compito di responsabilità...

programme.title: La Storia Infinita
programme.desc: Tratto dal bestseller mondiale di Michael Ende, "La storia infinita" è l'odissea di un bambino catapultato in un mondo senza tempo popolato da creature fantastiche che solo lui può salvare.

programme.title: Spirito selvaggio
programme.desc: Kacie, una ragazza dallo spirito ribelle, trova uno spirito affine in Blaze, un cavallo da corsa che si rifiuta di essere addomesticato.

programme.title: Gli acchiappamostri
programme.desc: Un’avventura soprannaturale per tutta la famiglia. Alex vuole aiutare il suo fratellino a smettere di avere incubi, quindi decide di formare una squadra per prendersi cura dei suoi mostri immaginari.

programme.title: Mr. Magorium e la bottega
programme.desc: Molly Mahoney è la goffa e insicura della Bottega delle Meraviglie di Mr. Magorium, il negozio di giocattoli più strano e fantastico del mondo.

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: I Rider di Hakum si dividono di nuovo e Avinia fa visita allo Zio Didi per rendere Frostfang più potente. Ma lungo la strada sarà costretta ad affrontare Gale.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Avinia racconta ciò che ha scoperto su Gale ai suoi amici del Villaggio di Hakum, intanto Loloa sparisce e Anvis si prepara a usare la tecnica segreta del Villaggio di Quon su Shadow.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Con l'aiuto dei suoi amici del Villaggio di Hakum, Avinia inizia a mettere insieme i pezzi di ciò che sa del Rito del Villaggio di Quon, mentre la situazione si fa sempre più tesa tra i Quattro Sommi di Anvis.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Gale ha il compito di catturare Avinia e per questo conduce l'attacco dei Rider Oscuri al Villaggio di Hakum, ma questa volta i Rider sono pronti e Avinia è decisa a combattere.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute e Cheval partono all'inseguimento di Avinia insieme a Gale, Lilia scopre delle informazioni sul Rito di Sovrapposizione e lo sfortunato Debli arriva in ritardo per la sua missione di salvataggio.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Anvis rivela a Gale e Avinia il loro passato e il motivo che l'ha spinto a fare ciò che ha fatto. Gale deve prendere una decisione difficile che avrà conseguenze terribili.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Scoppiando del ritrovato potere, Anvis e il suo mostro alato si dirigono al Villaggio Fulkranite. È compito di Lute e i suoi amici cercare di fermarlo.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Tutti collaborano quando Simone organizza un incontro per elaborare una strategia per sconfiggere Anvis e il suo Kushala Daora mentre si avvicinano a Gildegaran.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make hamburgers with sides and dessert for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: smash burgers, pickle slaw, matchstick fries, and strawberry chocolate milkshakes!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a fresh meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: lamb lettuce wraps, asparagus soup with dill, and apricot turnovers!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a rainy day meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: Shepherd’s pie, crispy green beans, and no bake chai cheesecake!

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts shares some of his favorite mackerel and mussel recipes that highlight aromatic, vibrant and fresh herbs.

programme.title: Gusto's QR Countdown
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our most popular fruit recipes, from hosts like Spencer Watts and Kimberly Lallouz.

programme.title: Gusto's QR Countdown
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our most popular snack recipes, from hosts like Kyle Crawford and Vanessa Gianfrancesco.

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik put their heads together to design a three-course menu, where each course must be based around just one color! It’s monochrome madness!

programme.desc: Pastor Larry Huch instructs viewers on how to enter into a realm of blessing and revelation through the studies of the Jewish roots of the Christian faith.

programme.desc: Messianic-Jewish host Sid Roth features a wide array of guests who have experienced divine visitations, deliverance and other supernatural events.

programme.title: Voice of God with Joseph Z
programme.desc: Joseph Z's faith-filled journalism and Bible teaching for the Last Days will provide prophetic insights and predictions of global events.

programme.title: James A. McMenis
programme.desc: Pastor James McMenis shares Jesus Christ's love with those lost, to bring clarity to the Word of God and make it relevant to people everywhere.

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Learn how obedience to God's Word opens the door to His creative power and blessings that transform your everyday life.

programme.desc: Bill Winston delivers the gospel of Jesus Christ worldwide, enabling people to know Christ and become stronger Christians.

programme.desc: Dr. Weiss hopes to help the women that follow God narrow down their search by offering ways to search for a good man of God.

programme.title: Paula Today

programme.title: Green revolution forward
programme.desc: La terza stagione di Green Revolution prende vita da un evento fisico, occasione di incontro e networking tra istituzioni, aziende, enti di formazione, giovani e talent scout, che si confrontano sui temi della sostenibilità e della responsabilità sociale

programme.title: Hidden Tropical Paradise 2
programme.desc: Taveuni and Small Outer Islands of Fiji.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: An aerial journey to the remote fjords and valleys of eastern Iceland.

programme.title: Hawaii Palms + Waves
programme.desc: Featuring a scene of coastal palms, green grass and blue waves in the early morning light and a backdrop of stereo nature sounds; shot on location in Oahu, Hawaii at the Turtle Bay Resort.

programme.title: A Day in Santorini
programme.desc: A visual journey through the coastal village of Oia, found on the far tip of Santorini Island.

programme.title: Turtle Paradise
programme.desc: Dive into an undersea world inhabited by the sea turtles; featuring real-time video scenes captured from around the Caribbean, paired with gentle underwater sounds and calming music for relaxation.

programme.title: Crystal Blue Waves
programme.desc: The sights and sounds of big waves breaking along a coastal pier on a blue-sky day.

programme.title: Sunny Sandy Beach: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Unwinding by an idyllic stretch of sand where time stands still surrounded by luxurious flora and light navy blue waters.

programme.title: Flying Over Scotland
programme.desc: Soaring over the lush green landscape and enchanting waters of Scotland in a bird's-eye view voyage.

programme.title: Redwood Coast: California
programme.desc: Exploring forests with some of the biggest trees in the world.

programme.title: Rushing Rocky Stream: Hawaii
programme.desc: Along the Pipiwai Trail, take an unforgettable walk through Hawaii's immense and picture-perfect bamboo forest.

programme.title: Diamond Beach I: Indonesia
programme.desc: An immersion into turquoise waters and a rocky coastline in Bali, Indonesia.

programme.title: Disappearing Beauty
programme.desc: From awe-inspiring wildlife to unbelievable landscapes, lose yourself in this compilation of mind-soothing footage-an ode to our planet's fleeting natural wonders.

programme.title: A Day in Mt Rainier 2
programme.desc: A slow journey to some of the most beautiful and hidden sections of Mount Rainier National Park in Washington state.

programme.title: Lombok Beaches: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experiencing the beaches of an Indonesian island set to a peaceful soundtrack.

programme.title: Spring in Japan
programme.desc: Relaxing with the sights and sounds of spring in Japan's mountainous regions during spring cherry blossom bloom, paired with soothing piano music.

programme.title: Ruby Beach Sunset
programme.desc: Relax for a full hour as a golden, soothing sunset slowly unfolds and turns to dusk as seen from Ruby Beach, on Washington state's Olympic Peninsula; you'll be lulled into a state of tranquil relaxation thanks to the sounds of rhythmic ocean waves gently crashing over the pebbly beach paired with the dazzling collage of four different sunset scenes shot in 4K.

programme.title: Moraine Lake Relaxation
programme.desc: Moraine Lake in Banff National Park.

programme.title: Wild Window
programme.desc: A look at the dazzling fish that inhabit the marine landscapes of the Tropical Pacific; exploring their daily lives as they forage and school in the depths of the ocean.

programme.title: Relaxing Nature Sceneries
programme.desc: The filmmaker provides a collection of peaceful nature scenes and tranquil vistas that will soothe body and soul.

programme.title: Manuel Antonio Park: Costa Rica
programme.desc: Manuel Antonio Park: Costa Rica

programme.title: Date With Nature
programme.desc: Slip away to Thailand's secluded shores and hidden streams, where aquatic life glides through crystal-clear waters.

programme.title: Mediterraneo
programme.desc: In the heart of the Mediterranean lies a world where nature keeps some of its most breathtaking secrets. Carved between Africa, Asia, and Europe, this deep sea is home to extraordinary wildlife and waters so blue they draw visitors from across the globe. A sea that not only boasts natural beauty but also witnessed the dawn of the world’s earliest civilisations.

programme.title: Colours of Mediterranean Culture
programme.desc: From Malta to Greece, Mediterranean arts flourish. Valletta Baroque Festival, Malta International Arts Festival, and Birgu by Candlelight light up the island with music and heritage. Italy’s Cortona on the Move, La Fenice in Piazza San Marco, and Mercantia Festival showcase photography, opera, and street performance. France’s Art Paris and International Garden Festival, Spain’s Revela’t Festival and La Leyenda de Tartessos, Portugal’s Umbrella Sky Project and Walk & Talk Biennale, Turkey’s Istanbul Theatre Festival and Biennial, and Greece’s Athens & Epidaurus Festival highlight the Med’s rich artistic tapestry.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Rome
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Rome, Italy — a city of ancient ruins, grand monuments, and unforgettable food. She experiences daily Roman life, from enjoying cappuccino and cornetto at a local café to tasting classic pastas like cacio e pepe and pasta alla gricia. She visits local markets, enjoys a picnic at Villa Doria Pamphili, and discovers Rome’s iconic landmarks — the Spanish Steps, Trevi Fountain, and Pantheon — beautifully lit at night.

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Gold Cuisine EP 20
programme.desc: Savor the flavors of Cyprus with Agiotiko stew, a rich and hearty traditional dish, paired with a delicate cream of anari wrapped in crispy filo pastry. A satisfying mix of savory comfort and sweet indulgence.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Kaštela (U masliniku)
programme.desc: In Kaštela, a cluster of seven towns near Split, winemaking runs deep. Among olive groves and vineyards, Mladen Kuzmanić treated us to local flavors—sipa i bob, pancetta, goat cheese, and homemade sausage—perfectly paired with a glass of regional wine.

programme.title: MED Destination LJUBLJANA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Whats On Lights, Cinema, Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean screens its stories this week. Malta hosts the Mediterranean Film Festival, while Italy Venice Film Festival and Med Film Festival bring glamour and regional storytelling to iconic locations. France Cannes Film Festival shines globally, Spain International Fantastic Film Festival of Catalonia celebrates genre cinema, and Morocco Amazigh Film Festival showcases North African voices. Turkey Adana Golden Boll Film Festival and Croatia Zagreb Film Festival round out a cinematic journey across the Med.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Exploring Croatia, Montenegro, and Bosnia, we’ll get to know the three major groups of the former Yugoslavia, Croats, Serbs, and Bosniaks, before enjoying a bit of fun in the sun along the Adriatic in Dubrovnik.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: MED Destination VENICE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Malini Angelica Basque
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits San Sebastián, Spain’s Basque Country, exploring its unique culture, history, and world-renowned cuisine. She goes on a pintxo crawl, visits La Concha beach, nearby towns like Getaria and Zarautz for local specialties, experiences a traditional txoko, and ends with Semana Grande fireworks.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: Med Nations 08 Egypt
programme.desc: Journey along the northern coast of Egypt, where the Mediterranean meets the land of the pharaohs. From the historic streets and libraries of Alexandria to charming coastal towns and bustling markets, Egypt reveals a unique blend of ancient heritage, vibrant culture, and seaside traditions that continue to shape life along its Mediterranean shores.

programme.title: The Odyssey the Man Who Defied the Gods
programme.desc: Devastated by the meaningless of the war on Troy, Odysseus is angry at the Gods for having stood by and let the carnage unfurl. All he wants to do is go home. But his journey will be an odyssey...

programme.title: Opera - Salome
programme.desc: The 87th Festival of the Maggio Musicale Fiorentino opens with Richard Strauss's Salome, conducted by Alexander Soddy. Directed by Emma Dante, this new production features Lidia Fridman as Salome, Anna Maria Chiuri as Herodias, and Nikolai Schukoff as Herodes. The performance blends Strauss's intense musical drama with a fresh and dynamic staging.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Fabio Luisi e Alexander Gadjiev Torino 2022
programme.desc: On April 28, 2022, esteemed conductor Fabio Luisi and acclaimed pianist Alexander Gadjiev took the stage at the Auditorium Rai "Arturo Toscanini" in Turin, accompanied by the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai. Gadjiev delivered a masterful performance of Chopin’s Piano Concerto No. 2, while Luisi led a captivating interpretation of Strauss’ "Aus Italien".

programme.title: Colours of Mediterranean Culture
programme.desc: From Malta to Greece, Mediterranean arts flourish. Valletta Baroque Festival, Malta International Arts Festival, and Birgu by Candlelight light up the island with music and heritage. Italy’s Cortona on the Move, La Fenice in Piazza San Marco, and Mercantia Festival showcase photography, opera, and street performance. France’s Art Paris and International Garden Festival, Spain’s Revela’t Festival and La Leyenda de Tartessos, Portugal’s Umbrella Sky Project and Walk & Talk Biennale, Turkey’s Istanbul Theatre Festival and Biennial, and Greece’s Athens & Epidaurus Festival highlight the Med’s rich artistic tapestry.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: Med Nations 08 Egypt
programme.desc: Journey along the northern coast of Egypt, where the Mediterranean meets the land of the pharaohs. From the historic streets and libraries of Alexandria to charming coastal towns and bustling markets, Egypt reveals a unique blend of ancient heritage, vibrant culture, and seaside traditions that continue to shape life along its Mediterranean shores.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Hvar (Stari Grad)
programme.desc: The island of Hvar, Croatia’s sunniest spot, is perfect for enjoying a traditional Dalmatian marenda. In the charming town of Stari Grad, restaurateur Damir Čavić welcomed us with a spread of marinated anchovies, octopus salad, pašticada, cod, and vegetables—washed down with a light bevanda.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Florence
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Florence, the heart of Tuscany and birthplace of the Renaissance. She visits iconic landmarks like the Duomo, Uffizi Gallery, and Ponte Vecchio, uncovering the city’s artistic legacy. Along the way, she enjoys Tuscan classics like Bistecca alla Fiorentina and the delicious schiaccata panino.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: When Rome was little more than a village, Athens was already laying the foundations of Western civilization. And today, amid its rich heritage, Greece’s vibrant capital continues to thrive.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine EP 20
programme.desc: Savor the flavors of Cyprus with Agiotiko stew, a rich and hearty traditional dish, paired with a delicate cream of anari wrapped in crispy filo pastry. A satisfying mix of savory comfort and sweet indulgence.

programme.title: Whats On Lights, Cinema, Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean screens its stories this week. Malta hosts the Mediterranean Film Festival, while Italy Venice Film Festival and Med Film Festival bring glamour and regional storytelling to iconic locations. France Cannes Film Festival shines globally, Spain International Fantastic Film Festival of Catalonia celebrates genre cinema, and Morocco Amazigh Film Festival showcases North African voices. Turkey Adana Golden Boll Film Festival and Croatia Zagreb Film Festival round out a cinematic journey across the Med.

programme.title: Split (Firule)
programme.desc: In Split’s Firule neighborhood—home to Croatia’s tennis greats—we discovered more than just sport. Renowned chef Hrvoje Zirojević welcomed us with a taste of tradition: pivac na tingul, a classic Dalmatian stew made with tender young rooster.

programme.title: Med Nations 10 Malta
programme.desc: Malta, a small island nation with a big Mediterranean story. From the historic streets of Valletta to sun-soaked beaches and ancient temples, Malta reveals a vibrant blend of history, culture, and coastal life shaped by centuries of Mediterranean influence.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Naples is Italy in the extreme. We’ll prowl backstreet fish markets and dodge speedy Vespas before indulging in pizza where it was invented. Afterward, we'll climb to the top of nearby Mount Vesuvius, then wander through the ruins of Pompeii, the Roman town it destroyed.

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Property Transfer: Protection vs Efficiency
programme.desc: As property markets evolve, the laws governing ownership and transfer must evolve with them. This panel investigates how legal structures can protect buyers and investors without slowing progress, and what reforms are needed to ensure efficient, transparent, and future-ready property transfer across the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Med Nations 10 Malta
programme.desc: Malta, a small island nation with a big Mediterranean story. From the historic streets of Valletta to sun-soaked beaches and ancient temples, Malta reveals a vibrant blend of history, culture, and coastal life shaped by centuries of Mediterranean influence.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Experiencing Madrid at its fun-loving best, we stare down a flamenco dancer, nibble pigs' ears, and ogle lavish palaces before side-tripping for some unforgettable history.

programme.title: Whats On Rhythms of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean dances to its own beat. Malta Muzika Muzika showcases national talent, while Italy Nameless Festival delivers international rock and electronic energy. Spain Azkena Rock Festival rocks Vitoria Gasteiz with legendary performances, and Turkey Istanbul Caz Festival blends jazz and local musical traditions. Discover how Mediterranean rhythms echo across genres, generations, and cultures.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Casablanca
programme.desc: A lot of people say Casablanca isn’t worth visiting and that you should head straight to Marrakesh or Fez — but Malini Angelica completely disagrees! In this video, she explores Morocco’s most authentic city and discovers where Europe meets Africa in a fascinating blend of culture, history, and architecture. It’s not overrun with tourists, it’s 100% real, and it ended up being her favorite city in Morocco!

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Jesenice
programme.desc: In the hillside village of Staro Selo Jesenice, with views of the central Dalmatian islands, we found stone houses, a bocce court, and a traditional tavern run by Ante Bajso. There, he treated us to a Dalmatian classic—meat slow-cooked under a bell-shaped lid, peka.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Here along the Côte d’Azur, we wander the sunlit promenades of Nice, catch whispers of fortunes changing hands at Monaco’s famed casino, and step inside the elegant villas once home to artists and heiresses.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Barcelona
programme.desc: Barcelona, Spain, is a city close to Malini's heart. Returning after her student years, she retraces old steps to see how the city has changed. Barcelona, one of Europe’s most visited cities, still holds centuries-old charm. Malina's old haunts include El Gòtic, Sant Antoni, Passeig de Gràcia, and Barceloneta. visits Gaudí’s iconic Casa La Pedrera, and discovers the new wave of creative tapas restaurants in El Raval, a once run-down quarter now bursting with energy.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Join Rick as he roams the lively streets of Barcelona, savoring its artistic treasures and flavorful tapas, before venturing to nearby landmarks in the proudly distinct region of Catalunya.

programme.title: The Odyssey Cyclops Curse
programme.desc: Odysseus and his companions are trapped in the Cyclops’ cave. But he is a man with a plan. He carves out a stake and, after having drunk Polyphemus under the table, drives it into his one eye. But outwitting the monster is just one of many challenges that awaits him and his men.

programme.title: Whats On Rhythms of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean dances to its own beat. Malta Muzika Muzika showcases national talent, while Italy Nameless Festival delivers international rock and electronic energy. programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Brač (Supetar)
programme.desc: On Brač, famed for its white stone, Zlatni Rat beach, and Vidova Gora, we stopped in Supetar to taste tradition. Restaurateur Teo Dragičević served us šporka juha, mišanca, and vitalac—authentic island flavors rooted in Brač’s rich culinary heritage.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Amalfi
programme.desc: Malini Angelica travels to Italy’s stunning Amalfi Coast, exploring its dramatic cliffs, colorful seaside towns, and crystal-clear waters. From the charm of Positano and Amalfi to the tranquility of Ravello, she experiences the region’s beauty, cuisine, and coastal lifestyle. Malini captures the magic that makes the Amalfi Coast one of Italy’s most breathtaking destinations.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite meets a Nawab in Lucknow, who shows her how to make Gosht Mawazad, a decadent Awadhi dish with mutton and dry fruits.

programme.title: Kissed By The Sea
programme.desc: Blessed with coral reefs, sapphire waters and powder-white beaches, Mauritius is the kind of place that rewards even the smallest attempts at exploration. Renowned adventurer, Sakshi Pradhan finds herself in an old lighthouse on Fouquet Island and then stumbles upon the Junk Café. From snorkeling in sapphire waters to taking a walk with lions in Casela National Park, she comes across various adventures in Mauritius, which make her feel alive.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries a massage inspired by the waves of the sea and a chocolate vanilla body wrap at the Gaya Island Resort in Malaysia.

programme.title: Burn Appetit
programme.desc: Located in the heart of the Austrian Alps' most highly glaciated section, Zillertal offers Jolly the thrills of winter in summer.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite meets the descendants of the royal families of Hyderabad and Lucknow, and they tell her about the culture and cuisine of both kingdoms.

programme.desc: Eight states. Three time zones. One road: Route 66! A young American traveler, Genevieve has taken on the granddaddy of all American road trips.

programme.title: Kissed By The Sea
programme.desc: While exploring island life in Mauritius, Sakshi Pradhan tries out the third longest zipline in the world and sees the unique phenomenon of the 23 coloured Earth at Vallée des Couleurs. Following this, she takes a submarine ride and explores the passion of the locals for horse races. She also encounters tortoises and crocodiles at the Vanilla Crocodile Park.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Travel to Da Nang this week with World Spas and take a peek into the life of the pampered few.

programme.title: Burn Appetit
programme.desc: On his way from Zillertal to Innsbruck, Jolly makes some rather fascinating pit-stops that lead him to uncover shades of Austria’s heritage.

programme.title: Viajar Mexico
programme.desc: Charlie introduces the indigenous handicrafts of Oaxaca, including the whimsical creatures with a unique story.

programme.title: Viajar Mexico

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: City break
programme.desc: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that’s alpine-urban yet traditional in nature.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: A homely place where the aroma of freshly baked bread greets you as people smoothly glide along on their bicycles. Welcome to Copenhagen.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.desc: Indeya explores the Cinnamon plantations, tries a local dish and witnesses a traditional dance performance.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex has varied experiences in Dubai like trying Lebanese cheese bread, visiting a coffee museum, going to IMG Worlds of Adventure and more.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: This exhilarating city of castles, beer and segway rides can take you on a break that will truly leave you catching your breath.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Visit Belgrade, with Heather as she explores the city, its architecture and learns about its past by visiting historical monuments.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.
